description: B2B SaaS multi-tenant expense management platform with approval workflows and accounting integrations

apps.name: accounts
apps.responsibility: User authentication, company tenancy, SSO, role and permission management

apps.name: expenses
apps.responsibility: Expense report creation, line item management, receipt attachment, status lifecycle

apps.name: budgets
apps.responsibility: Budget definition per team and department, spending tracking, threshold alerts

apps.name: approvals
apps.responsibility: Multi-step approval workflow engine, escalation rules, audit trail, rejection reasons

apps.name: payments
apps.responsibility: Reimbursement processing, payment status tracking, accounting system integration

apps.name: notifications
apps.responsibility: Email and in-app notification delivery for status changes and budget alerts

apps.name: reporting
apps.responsibility: Spending trend aggregation, CSV export, dashboard data endpoints

shared_infrastructure.auth_strategy: JWT with refresh tokens + SSO via social-auth-app-django
shared_infrastructure.database: PostgreSQL with row-level security per company
